sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8833" key="a)nqraki/des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθρᾰκ-ίδες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n8833.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">small fish for frying,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0494.tlg001:13:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philyll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
